facebook.caption:
POV: you stopped scrolling past Si's Crab House and actually booked the table.

4.3 stars. 1,733 reviews. Live crab pulled straight from the tank on Đường Nguyễn Trãi.

This is the spot locals point you to when you ask where they actually eat seafood. Not the resort buffet. Here.

Budget $40-80 per person. Worth every dong.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the crab go from tank to table at Si's Crab House. 1,733 people rated this place and it shows. Đường Nguyễn Trãi, Phu Quoc. Book ahead.
